candidates.title: Synthetic Observation Packet Validator
candidates.description: Build a validator that checks whether public-safe observation packets contain source, claim, privacy, missingness, measurable variables, and falsification route fields.
candidates.missingness: validator not yet implemented against real repository fixtures
candidates.revision_reason: convert discovery ambition into executable data quality check
candidates.implementation_status: candidate fixture ready for validator testing
candidates.testability: passes if valid synthetic packets are accepted and malformed packets are rejected with field-level errors
candidates.next_executable_action: Create JSON Schema and validator test for synthetic observation packets.
candidates.falsification_route: Candidate fails if generated packets pass without required boundary fields or if invalid packets are not rejected.
acceptance_criteria: validator exits nonzero for a file missing falsification_route

candidates.title: Contradiction-to-Hypothesis Mapper
candidates.description: Prototype a mapper that turns public-safe contradiction records into candidate hypotheses and falsification routes.
candidates.revision_reason: make contradictions generate tests instead of only notes
candidates.implementation_status: planned candidate with expected fixture requirement
candidates.testability: passes if synthetic contradiction inputs produce measurable hypotheses, predictions, and falsification routes
candidates.next_executable_action: Create five synthetic contradiction fixtures and expected hypothesis outputs.
candidates.falsification_route: Candidate fails if contradictions produce vague insights without measurable predictions.
acceptance_criteria: each contradiction maps to at least one hypothesis
each hypothesis includes at least one prediction

candidates.title: Literature-to-Variable Extractor
candidates.description: Design a schema for extracting variables, mechanisms, evidence strength, and missingness from scientific papers into public-safe research maps.
candidates.missingness: needs source corpus and extraction rubric
candidates.revision_reason: move from reading papers to generating structured discovery inputs
candidates.implementation_status: schema candidate awaiting source-text fixture test
candidates.testability: passes if reviewers can reconstruct extracted variables from source text using the schema
candidates.next_executable_action: Draft schema fields and test them on three public abstracts.
candidates.falsification_route: Candidate fails if independent reviewers cannot reconstruct extracted variables from source text.
acceptance_criteria: schema represents variable, mechanism, evidence strength, and missingness
three public abstracts can be encoded without private data
